---
title: "Stepan Paul"

about:
    template: solana
    image: headshot-small2.jpeg
    links:
        - icon: "envelope"
          text: Email
          url: "mailto:sspaul2@ncsu.edu"
        - icon: "file-person"
          text: "CV"
          url: "https://docs.google.com/document/d/11vqWYgZp8bdWgiQbYHlB3N1lFdD4uenZzbVBylsT4GY/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.70hhuwiz6np7"
---

I am an Associate Teaching Professor of [Mathematics](https://math.ncsu.edu/) at [North Carolina State University](https://www.ncsu.edu/) where I've worked since 2020. I focus on [teaching](teaching.qmd), curriculum development, [mathematical illustration](projects.qmd#category=Illustration), and service to the undergraduate programs in the department.

I am the Adminstrator for the [Minor in Mathematics](https://math.sciences.ncsu.edu/undergraduate/undergraduate-programs/mathematics-minor/) at NC State, and I coordinate MA 242 - Calculus III (multivariable and vector calculus) and MA 103 - Topics in Contemporary Mathematics (a liberal arts mathematics course). I also organize the departmental Teaching and Learning Seminar.

I serve on the Departmental Faculty Advisor Committee, Mathematics Undergraduate Course and Curriculum Committee, Recruitment Committee, and Undergraduate Advising Committee.
